description: LLM / AI chat or assistant product surface.
expected_intents: send a message and get a coherent streamed response
start a new conversation and switch between conversations
handle an empty, very long, or malformed input gracefully
recover when the model errors, times out, or is rate-limited
copy, edit, or delete a prior message
understand and stay within usage limits
critical_paths: prompt -> stream -> complete -> follow-up retains context
model error / timeout -> visible recoverable state -> retry works
common_failure_modes: stop button does not actually cancel the stream
error swallowed; UI shows an empty or frozen bubble
rate-limit hit with no explanation or recovery path
no visible end state on failure (spinner forever)
often_missing_paths: see and understand the usage / quota state
evidence_cautions: do not run cost-incurring bulk generations; blocked -> evidence debt
prod-only model backends may be avoided -> evidence debt
